parameters: Jonny
I got another warning from school today.
You’re popular! Getting warnings is basically your middle name.
Don’t worry about it. You can make it up later.
You’ve never really cared about warnings before. Did something happen?
You’re popular! Getting warnings is basically your middle name.
Jonny
Yeah, forget it...
A diploma is just a piece of paper, Johnny.
The Johnny I know doesn’t care about that kind of stuff.
Do you want to talk about it?
A diploma is just a piece of paper, Johnny.
Jonny
So I skip class, show up late...
And when I do, she gets on my case.
The Johnny I know doesn’t care about that kind of stuff.
Jonny
So I skip class, show up late...
And when I do, she gets on my case.
Do you want to talk about it?
Jonny
I don’t know. Lately it’s been hard to even get out of bed.
That’s why I never show up to first period.
Who even likes waking up early to study? haha
You seem kinda down. If you wanna talk, I’m here, okay?
That’s why I never show up to first period.

Player
Who?
Jonny
My girlfriend. We fought again.
Then just break up already! Stop complaining so much.
Couples fight, that’s normal.
So what did you guys fight about?
Then just break up already! Stop complaining so much.
Jonny
At least I’ve got a girlfriend, right?
A girlfriend and the whole school at your feet!
No need to show off on your single friend, dude.
So what did you fight about?
A girlfriend and the whole school at your feet!
Jonny
What can I do? I’m awesome like that, right?
No need to show off on your single friend, dude.
Jonny
What can I do? I’m awesome like that, right?
So what did you fight about?
Jonny
She says I’ve been distant. That I’ve been pulling away.
That I’m not the same guy she used to know.
I guess she’s right.
That’s just your girlfriend being jealous and not wanting you to race anymore.
You just need to race again and you’ll be back to normal.
You don’t really seem okay with this...
That’s just your girlfriend being jealous and not wanting you to race anymore.
You just need to race again and you’ll be back to normal.
You don’t really seem okay with this...
Jonny
I don’t know... it feels like I’m watching my life
from far away. I don’t even feel like doing the things
I used to love anymore.
Jonny
I used to only think about the next race.
Now even that doesn’t seem to matter much.

Jonny
Remember when I used to spend the whole week
waiting for the street races?
You just need some adrenaline. You should race more.
It’s just a phase, Johnny. There’s a race tomorrow, you’ll forget all about this.
It’s weird that you’re not even excited about racing.
You just need some adrenaline. You should race more.
Jonny
Speaking of which... I was thinking about that curve...
It’s just a phase, Johnny. There’s a race tomorrow, you’ll forget all about this.
Jonny
Speaking of which... I was thinking about that curve...
It’s weird that you’re not even excited about racing.
Jonny
Yeah... I’ve even been thinking about selling the Opala.
But not before I try the last curve...
Player
What curve, Jonny?
Jonny
Devil’s Curve... I’m thinking of giving it a try.
You’d be the biggest legend in town.
That’s so you, Jonny. If you say can do it...
The last guy who tried died. You’re not serious, right?
You’d be the biggest legend in town.
Jonny
Yeah... I know.
My friend Jonny is the best! You’re going to crush it tomorrow.
That’s just like you, Jonny! The only possible winner tomorrow.
But... The last guy who tried that turn died. Are you serious about this?
My friend Jonny is the best! You’re going to crush it tomorrow.
Jonny
Wow, there’s a race tomorrow. I had almost
forgotten about it. I think I need to rest...
Player
Are you sending me away? Haha It’s late, you’re right.
See you tomorrow?
Jonny
See you tomorrow. Maybe I’ll finally do something...
interesting there.

Jonny
I’m just saying… the idea sounds more tempting than
it should. Sometimes I don’t really care
what happens after.
Player
Jonny, you’re not the kind of person who takes risks.
There’s a race tomorrow. Promise me you won’t do this.
Jonny
Right… there’s a race tomorrow. I almost forgot.
I think I need some rest…
Player
Don’t change the subject, Jonny. Promise me
you won’t take Devil’s Curve.
Jonny
Alright, I promise. I’ll try not to wreck the Opala.
